languages.text: "Какая незадача! Ведь род Каливин — это малый род Драйвстемов. Буквально дюжина человек, которых я знаю наперечет".

traits.locale_text: "Какая незадача! Ведь род Каливин — это малый род Драйвстемов. Буквально дюжина человек, которых я знаю наперечет".

languages.text: "Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."
languages.original_text: "Какая незадача! Ведь род Каливин — это малый род Драйвстемов. Буквально дюжина человек, которых я знаю наперечет".

traits.locale_text: "Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."
"Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."
"Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."

languages.text: “嗯，这就有些尴尬了……因为卡利文家族其实是德莱夫斯塔家的一个小分支。总共也就十来个人，而且每一个我都认识。”
languages.original_text: "Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."

traits.locale_text: “嗯，这就有些尴尬了……因为卡利文家族其实是德莱夫斯塔家的一个小分支。总共也就十来个人，而且每一个我都认识。”

languages.text: « Voilà qui est embarrassant... puisque les Kalivin sont une branche mineure de la maison Drivestem. Ils comptent en tout et pour tout une douzaine de membres, et je les connais tous personnellement. »
languages.original_text: "Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui est embarrassant... puisque les Kalivin sont une branche mineure de la maison Drivestem. Ils comptent en tout et pour tout une douzaine de membres, et je les connais tous personnellement. »

languages.text: "Şey, bu biraz utanç verici... Çünkü Kalivinler, Drivestem Hanesi'nin küçük bir yan koludur. Topu topu on iki kişiler ve ben onların her birini tanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."

traits.locale_text: "Şey, bu biraz utanç verici... Çünkü Kalivinler, Drivestem Hanesi'nin küçük bir yan koludur. Topu topu on iki kişiler ve ben onların her birini tanıyorum."

languages.text: «Vaya, qué embarazoso... resulta que los Kalivin son una rama menor de la casa Drivestem. En total serán unos doce, y los conozco a todos personalmente».
languages.original_text: "Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."

traits.locale_text: «Vaya, qué embarazoso... resulta que los Kalivin son una rama menor de la casa Drivestem. En total serán unos doce, y los conozco a todos personalmente».

languages.text: "Nun, das ist ein wenig beschämend ... da die Kalivins nur eine unbedeutende Nebenlinie von Haus Drivestem sind. Ein Dutzend Seelen, alles in allem, und ich kenne sie alle."
languages.original_text: "Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."

traits.locale_text: "Nun, das ist ein wenig beschämend ... da die Kalivins nur eine unbedeutende Nebenlinie von Haus Drivestem sind. Ein Dutzend Seelen, alles in allem, und ich kenne sie alle."

languages.text: 「うーん、これはかなり恥ずかしいですね…カリヴィン家はドライブステム家の分家であり、総勢12人しかいません。一人一人を知っています。」
languages.original_text: "Well, this is rather embarrassing... since the Kalivins are a minor offshoot of House Drivestem. A dozen souls, all told, and I know each and every one of them."

traits.locale_text: 「うーん、これはかなり恥ずかしいですね…カリヴィン家はドライブステム家の分家であり、総勢12人しかいません。一人一人を知っています。」
